parameterdescription.para: Camera characteristic metadata handle acquired from MLCameraGetCameraCharacteristics.
Array of aberration modes. The Library allocates and maintains the lifetime of the output data.
Number of output data elements.
Failed to obtain color correction aberration modes due to an invalid input parameter.
Successfully obtained color correction aberration modes.
Failed to obtain color correction aberration modes due to an unknown error.
Camera characteristic metadata handle acquired from MLCameraGetCameraCharacteristics.
Array of auto-exposure modes. The Library allocates and maintains the lifetime of the output data.
Number of output data elements.
Failed to obtain AE modes due to an invalid input parameter.
Successfully obtained AE modes.
Failed to obtain AE modes due to an unknown error.
Camera characteristic metadata handle acquired from MLCameraGetCameraCharacteristics.
Array of anti-banding modes. The Library allocates and maintains the lifetime of the output data.
Number of output data elements.
Failed to obtain AntiBanding modes due to an invalid input parameter.
Successfully obtained AntiBanding modes.
Failed to obtain AntiBanding modes due to an unknown error.
Camera characteristic metadata handle acquired from MLCameraGetCameraCharacteristics.
Array of min (1st) and max (2nd) of auto-exposure compensation. The adjustment is measured as a count of steps.
Failed to obtain AE compensation range due to an invalid input parameter.
Successfully obtained AE compensation range.
Failed to obtain AE compensation range due to an unknown error.
Camera characteristic metadata handle acquired from MLCameraGetCameraCharacteristics.
AE compensation step.
Failed to obtain AE compensation step due to an invalid input parameter.
Successfully obtained AE compensation step.
Failed to obtain AE compensation step due to an unknown error.
Camera characteristic metadata handle acquired from MLCameraGetCameraCharacteristics.
AE lock.
Failed to obtain AE lock due to an invalid input parameter.
Successfully obtained AE lock.
Failed to obtain AE lock due to an unknown error.
Camera characteristic metadata handle acquired from MLCameraGetCameraCharacteristics.
Num AE Regions.
Failed to obtain AE Max Regions due to an invalid input parameter.
Successfully obtained AE Max Regions.
Failed to obtain AE Max Regions due to an unknown error.
Camera characteristic metadata handle acquired from MLCameraGetCameraCharacteristics.
Array of modes. The Library allocates and maintains the lifetime of the output data.
Number of output data elements.
Failed to obtain Avaialble Modes due to an invalid input parameter.
Successfully obtained Available Modes.
Failed to obtain Available Modes due to an unknown error.
Camera characteristic metadata handle acquired from MLCameraGetCameraCharacteristics.
Array of AWB modes. The Library allocates and maintains the lifetime of the output data.
Number of output data elements.
Failed to obtain AWB modes due to an invalid input parameter.
Successfully obtained AWB modes.
Failed to obtain AWB modes due to an unknown error.
Camera characteristic metadata handle acquired from MLCameraGetCameraCharacteristics.
Array of AF modes. The Library allocates and maintains the lifetime of the output data.
Number of output data elements.
Failed to obtain AF modes due to an invalid input parameter.
Successfully obtained AF modes.
Failed to obtain AF modes due to an unknown error.

briefdescription.para: Gets max number of AF regions supported.

parameterdescription.para: Camera characteristic metadata handle acquired from MLCameraGetCameraCharacteristics.
Num AF Regions.
Failed to obtain AF Max Regions due to an invalid input parameter.
Successfully obtained AF Max Regions.
Failed to obtain AF Max Regions due to an unknown error.
Camera characteristic metadata handle acquired from MLCameraGetCameraCharacteristics.
Array of Scene modes. The Library allocates and maintains the lifetime of the output data.
Number of output data elements.
Failed to obtain Scene modes due to an invalid input parameter.
Successfully obtained Scene modes.
Failed to obtain Scene modes due to an unknown error.
Camera characteristic metadata handle acquired from MLCameraGetCameraCharacteristics.
Array of Effect modes. The Library allocates and maintains the lifetime of the output data.
Number of output data elements.
Failed to obtain Effect modes due to an invalid input parameter.
Successfully obtained Effect modes.
Failed to obtain Effect modes due to an unknown error.
Camera characteristic metadata handle acquired from MLCameraGetCameraCharacteristics.
AWB lock.
Failed to obtain AWB lock due to an invalid input parameter.
Successfully obtained AWB lock.
Failed to obtain AWB lock due to an unknown error.

briefdescription.para: Gets sensor info active array sizes.

parameterdescription.para: Camera characteristic metadata handle acquired from MLCameraGetCameraCharacteristics.
Active array size [left, top, right, bottom].
Failed to obtain sensor info active array sizes due to an invalid input parameter.
Successfully obtained sensor info active array sizes.
Failed to obtain sensor info active array sizes due to an unknown error.

briefdescription.para: Gets sensor info sensitivity range (Analog Gain).

parameterdescription.para: Camera characteristic metadata handle acquired from MLCameraGetCameraCharacteristics.
Sensor info sensitivity range[min, max].
Failed to obtain sensor info sensitivity range due to an invalid input parameter.
Successfully obtained sensor info sensitivity range.
Failed to obtain sensor info sensitivity range due to an unknown error.

briefdescription.para: Gets post raw sensitivity boost range (Digital Gain).

parameterdescription.para: Camera characteristic metadata handle acquired from MLCameraGetCameraCharacteristics.
Post raw sensitivity boost range[min, max].
Failed to obtain post raw sensitivity boost range due to an invalid input parameter.
Successfully obtained post raw sensitivity boost range.
Failed to obtain post raw sensitivity boost range due to an unknown error.
Camera characteristic metadata handle acquired from MLCameraGetCameraCharacteristics.
Lens hyperfocal distance in diopters.
Failed to obtain hyperfocal distance due to an invalid input parameter.
Successfully obtained hyperfocal distance.
Failed to obtain hyperfocal distance due to an unknown error.
Camera characteristic metadata handle acquired from MLCameraGetCameraCharacteristics.
Minimum focus distance in diopters.
Failed to obtain minimum focus distance due to an invalid input parameter.
Successfully obtained minimum focus distance.
Failed to obtain minimum focus distance due to an unknown error.

briefdescription.para: Gets lens minimum focus distance increment. The lens position can be set in multiples of distance increments between hyperfocal distance and minimum focus distance.

parameterdescription.para: Camera characteristic metadata handle acquired from MLCameraGetCameraCharacteristics.
Minimum focus distance increment in diopters.
Failed to obtain minimum focus distance increment due to an invalid input parameter.

Auto-exposure regions. Regions array of area_size x 5[xmin, ymin, xmax, ymax, weight]. Coordinates must be between [(0,0), (width, height)).

Camera capture request metadata handle acquired from MLCameraPrepareCapture.
Auto-focus regions. Regions array of area_size x 5[xmin, ymin, xmax, ymax, weight]. Coordinates must be between [(0,0), (width, height)).
Number of auto-focus regions.
Failed to obtain AF regions due to an invalid input parameter.
Successfully obtained AF regions.
Failed to obtain AF regions due to an unknown error.

briefdescription.para: Gets AF distance range. Both Min and Max are specified as focus distance in diopters. The min value specifies the lower bound for focus distance used by Autofocus algorithm and should be more than min focus distance which can be queried using MLCameraMetadataGetLensInfoMinimumFocusDistance. The max value specifies the upper bound for focus distance used by Autofocus algorithm and should be less than hyperfocal distance which can be queried using api MLCameraMetadataGetLensInfoHyperfocalDistance.

parameterdescription.para: Camera capture request metadata handle acquired from MLCameraPrepareCapture.
AF distance range [min, max].
Failed to obtain AF distance range due to an invalid input parameter.
Successfully obtained AF distance range.
Failed to obtain AF distance range due to an unknown error.

briefdescription.para: Gets Lens focus distance in diopters. The distance is between minimum focus distance and hyperfocal distance.

parameterdescription.para: Camera capture request metadata handle acquired from MLCameraPrepareCapture.
Lens focus distance.
Failed to obtain Lens focus distance range due to an invalid input parameter.
Successfully obtained Lens focus distance range.
Failed to obtain Lens focus distance range due to an unknown error.
Camera capture request metadata handle acquired from MLCameraPrepareCapture.
Mode.
Failed to obtain mode due to an invalid input parameter.
Successfully obtained mode.
Failed to obtain mode due to an unknown error.
Camera capture request metadata handle acquired from MLCameraPrepareCapture.
Scene mode.
Failed to obtain scene mode due to an invalid input parameter.
Successfully obtained scene mode.
Failed to obtain scene mode due to an unknown error.
Camera capture request metadata handle acquired from MLCameraPrepareCapture.
Duration each pixel is exposed to light in nanoseconds.
Failed to obtain sensor exposure time due to an invalid input parameter.
Successfully obtained sensor exposure time.
Failed to obtain sensor exposure time due to an unknown error.
Camera capture request metadata handle acquired from MLCameraPrepareCapture.
Sensor sensitivity.

Successfully obtained sensor sensitivity.
Failed to obtain sensor sensitivity due to an unknown error.

Post raw sensitivity boost.

Successfully obtained post raw sensitivity boost.

Effect mode.

Successfully obtained effect mode.
Failed to obtain effect mode due to an unknown error.
Camera capture request metadata handle acquired from MLCameraPrepareCapture.
Exposure time upper limit for auto exposure algorithm.
Failed to obtain exposure time upper limit due to an invalid input parameter.
Successfully obtained exposure time upper limit.
Failed to obtain exposure time upperlimit due to an unknown error.
Camera capture request metadata handle acquired from MLCameraPrepareCapture.
JPEG GPS coordinates – latitude and longitude in degrees, altitude in meters.
Failed to obtain JPEG GPS coordinates due to an invalid input parameter.
Successfully obtained JPEG GPS coordinates.
Failed to obtain JPEG GPS coordinates due to an unknown error.
Camera capture request metadata handle acquired from MLCameraPrepareCapture.
JPEG timestamp in UNIX Epoch time (UTC in seconds since January 1, 1970).
Failed to obtain JPEG timestamp due to an invalid input parameter.
Successfully obtained JPEG timestamp.
Failed to obtain JPEG timestamp due to an unknown error.
Camera capture request metadata handle acquired from MLCameraPrepareCapture.
Resolution of embedded JPEG thumbnail.
Failed to obtain JPEG thumbnail size due to an invalid input parameter.
Successfully obtained JPEG thumbnail size.
Failed to obtain JPEG thumbnail size due to an unknown error.
Camera capture request metadata handle acquired from MLCameraPrepareCapture.
Compression quality of JPEG thumbnail, with 100 being the highest quality, and 1 the lowest.
Failed to obtain JPEG quality due to an invalid input parameter.
Successfully obtained JPEG quality.
Failed to obtain JPEG quality due to an unknown error.

briefdescription.para: Gets force apply mode. Main camera and CV Camera share the same camera hardware resources. When both the cameras are streaming, request metadata properties for both cameras are merged and then applied. While merging, the metadata properties from Main Camera take precedence over CV camera metadata properties. The force apply mode property can be used to override this. If CV Camera metadata has force apply mode on, the CV Camera metadata properties take precedence over Main Camera metadata properties.

parameterdescription.para: Camera capture request metadata handle acquired from MLCameraPrepareCapture.
Force apply mode.
Failed to obtain force apply mode due to an invalid input parameter.
Successfully obtained force apply mode.
Failed to obtain force apply mode due to an unknown error.
Camera capture request metadata handle acquired from MLCameraPrepareCapture.
Color correction mode.
Failed to set color correction mode due to an invalid input parameter.
Set color correction mode.
Failed to set color correction mode due to an unknown error.

briefdescription.para: Sets color correction transform from RGB color space to output linear sRGB.

parameterdescription.para: Camera capture request metadata handle acquired from MLCameraPrepareCapture.
Color correction transform (3x3). Set all values to 0/1 to clear the data.
Failed to set color correction transform due to an invalid input parameter.
Set color correction transform.
Failed to set color correction transform due to an unknown error.

briefdescription.para: Sets color correction gains. The gains in the request metadata are the gains applied by the camera device.

parameterdescription.para: Camera capture request metadata handle acquired from MLCameraPrepareCapture.
An array of floats for 4 color channel color correction gains. Set all values to 0 to clear the data.
Failed to set color correction gains due to an invalid input parameter.
Set color correction gains.
Failed to set color correction gains due to an unknown error.

briefdescription.para: Sets color correction chromatic aberration, minimizing chromatic artifacts that may occur.

parameterdescription.para: Camera capture request metadata handle acquired from MLCameraPrepareCapture.
Color correction aberration.
Failed to set color correction aberration due to an invalid input parameter.
Set color correction aberration.
Failed to set color correction aberration due to an unknown error.
Camera capture request metadata handle acquired from MLCameraPrepareCapture.
AE antibanding mode.
Failed to set AE antiband mode due to an invalid input parameter.
Set AE antiband mode.
Failed to set AE antiband mode due to an unknown error.
Camera capture request metadata handle acquired from MLCameraPrepareCapture.
Exposure compensation value as a count of steps. If exposure compensation is set to 0, no exposure compensation will be applied.
Failed to set AE exposure compensation due to an invalid input parameter.
Set AE exposure compensation.
Failed to set AE exposure compensation due to an unknown error.

detaileddescription.para: When auto-exposure is locked, the algorithm cannot update its parameters and adjust exposure times and sensitivity.

parameterdescription.para: Camera capture request metadata handle acquired from MLCameraPrepareCapture.
Auto-exposure Lock.
Failed to set AE lock due to an invalid input parameter.
Set AE lock.
Failed to set AE lock due to an unknown error.

briefdescription.para: Sets auto-exposure mode. MLCameraMetadataControlAEMode_Off is not supported if camera is configured for 15FPS.

parameterdescription.para: Camera capture request metadata handle acquired from MLCameraPrepareCapture.
Auto-exposure mode.
Failed to set AE mode due to an invalid input parameter.
Set AE mode.
Failed to set AE mode due to an unknown error.
Failed to set AE Mode due to conflict between fps setting and AE Mode.

memberdef.argsstring: (MLHandle request_handle, const int32_t data[3][5], const uint32_t count)
memberdef.name: MLCameraMetadataSetControlAERegions

parameterdescription.para: Camera capture request metadata handle acquired from MLCameraPrepareCapture.

Auto-exposure regions. Regions array of area_size x 5[xmin, ymin, xmax, ymax, weight] array with all zeros and count 1 clears the data. Coordinates must be between [(0,0), (width, height)). Max width, height can be obtained using MLCameraMetadataGetSensorInfoActiveArraySize. Weight for a region can be between [0,1000].For a region to be used its weight should be > 0. Weight is used to decide relative priority between multiple regions.
Number of auto-exposure regions.
Failed to set AE regions due to an invalid input parameter.
Set AE regions.
Failed to set AE regions due to an unknown error.
Camera capture request metadata handle acquired from MLCameraPrepareCapture.
Automatic White Balance Lock.
Failed to set AE target FPS range due to an invalid input parameter.
Set automatic white balance lock.
Failed to set automatic white balance lock due to an unknown error.
Camera capture request metadata handle acquired from MLCameraPrepareCapture.
AWB mode.
Failed to set AWB mode due to an invalid input parameter.
Set AWB mode.
Failed to set AWB mode due to an unknown error.
Camera capture request metadata handle acquired from MLCameraPrepareCapture.
AF mode.
Failed to set AF mode due to an invalid input parameter.
Successfully set AF mode.
Failed to set AF mode due to an unknown error.
Camera capture request metadata handle acquired from MLCameraPrepareCapture.
AF trigger.
Failed to set AF trigger due to an invalid input parameter.
Successfully set AF trigger.
Failed to set AF trigger due to an unknown error.

memberdef.argsstring: (MLHandle request_handle, const int32_t data[3][5], const uint32_t count)
memberdef.name: MLCameraMetadataSetControlAFRegions

parameterdescription.para: Camera capture request metadata handle acquired from MLCameraPrepareCapture.

Auto-focus regions. Regions array of area_size x 5[xmin, ymin, xmax, ymax, weight]. Coordinates must be between [(0,0), (width, height)). Max width, height can be obtained using MLCameraMetadataGetSensorInfoActiveArraySize. Weight for a region can be between [0,1000]. For a region to be used its weight should be > 0. All regions with weight > 0 are treated as same priority.
Number of auto-focus regions.
Failed to set AF regions due to an invalid input parameter.
Successfully set AF regions.
Failed to set AF regions due to an unknown error.

briefdescription.para: Sets AF distance range. Both min and max are specified as focus distance in diopters. The min value specifies the lower bound for focus distance used by Autofocus algorithm and should be more than min focus distance which can be queried using MLCameraMetadataGetLensInfoMinimumFocusDistance. The max value specifies the upper bound for focus distance used by Autofocus algorithm and should be less than hyperfocal distance which can be queried using api MLCameraMetadataGetLensInfoHyperfocalDistance.

parameterdescription.para: Camera capture request metadata handle acquired from MLCameraPrepareCapture.
AF distance range [min, max].
Failed to set AF distance range due to an invalid input parameter.
Successfully set AF distance range.
Failed to set AF distance range due to an unknown error.
Camera capture request metadata handle acquired from MLCameraPrepareCapture.
Lens focus distance.
Failed to set Lens focus distance due to an invalid input parameter.
Successfully set Lens focus distance.
Failed to set Lens focus distance due to an unknown error.
Camera capture request metadata handle acquired from MLCameraPrepareCapture.
Mode.
Failed to set mode due to an invalid input parameter.
Set mode.
Failed to set mode due to an unknown error.
Camera capture request metadata handle acquired from MLCameraPrepareCapture.
Scene mode.
Failed to set scene mode due to an invalid input parameter.
Set scene mode.
Failed to set scene mode due to an unknown error.

detaileddescription.para: Exposure time provided should be less than frame duration(1/framerate). If the sensor can't expose this exact duration, it will shorten the duration exposed to the nearest possible value.

parameterdescription.para: Camera capture request metadata handle acquired from MLCameraPrepareCapture.
Duration each pixel is exposed to light in nanoseconds.
Failed to set sensor exposure time due to an invalid input parameter.
Set sensor exposure time.
Failed to set sensor exposure time due to an unknown error.
Camera capture request metadata handle acquired from MLCameraPrepareCapture.
Sensor sensitivity.
Failed to set sensor sensitivity due to an invalid input parameter.
Set sensor sensitivity.
Failed to set sensor sensitivity due to an unknown error.
Camera capture request metadata handle acquired from MLCameraPrepareCapture.
Post raw sensitivity boost.
Failed to set post raw sensitivity boost due to an invalid input parameter.
Set post raw sensitivity boost.
Failed to set post raw sensitivity boost due to an unknown error.
Camera capture request metadata handle acquired from MLCameraPrepareCapture.
Effect mode.
Failed to set effect mode due to an invalid input parameter.
Set effect mode.
Failed to set effect mode due to an unknown error.
Camera capture request metadata handle acquired from MLCameraPrepareCapture.
Exposure time upper limit. Null pointer will clear the data.
Failed to set exposure time upper limit due to an invalid input parameter.
Set exposure time upper limit.
Failed to set exposure time upperlimit due to an unknown error.
Camera capture request metadata handle acquired from MLCameraPrepareCapture.
JPEG GPS coordinates – latitude and longitude in degrees, altitude in meters.Null pointer will clear the data.
Failed to set JPEG GPS coordinates due to an invalid input parameter.
Set JPEG GPS coordinates.
Failed to set JPEG GPS coordinates due to an unknown error.
Camera capture request metadata handle acquired from MLCameraPrepareCapture.
JPEG timestamp in UNIX Epoch time (UTC in seconds since January 1, 1970). Null pointer will clear the data.
Failed to set JPEG timestamp due to an invalid input parameter.
Set JPEG timestamp.
Failed to set JPEG timestamp due to an unknown error.
Camera capture request metadata handle acquired from MLCameraPrepareCapture.
Resolution of embedded JPEG thumbnail. Null pointer will prevent the inclusion of a thumbnail.
Failed to set JPEG thumbnail size due to an invalid input parameter.
Set JPEG thumbnail size.
Failed to set JPEG thumbnail size due to an unknown error.
Camera capture request metadata handle acquired from MLCameraPrepareCapture.
Compression quality of JPEG thumbnail, with 100 being the highest quality, and 1 the lowest.
Failed to set JPEG quality due to an invalid input parameter.
Set JPEG quality.
Failed to set JPEG quality due to an unknown error.

briefdescription.para: Sets force apply mode. Main camera and CV Camera share the same camera hardware resources. When both the cameras are streaming, request metadata properties for both cameras are merged and then applied. While merging, the metadata properties from Main Camera take precedence over CV camera metadata properties. The force apply mode property can be used to override this. If CV Camera metadata has force apply mode on, the CV Camera metadata properties take precedence over Main Camera metadata properties.

parameterdescription.para: Camera capture request metadata handle acquired from MLCameraPrepareCapture.
Force apply mode.
Failed to set force apply mode due to an invalid input parameter.
Successfully set force apply mode.
Failed to set force apply mode due to an unknown error.
Camera capture result metadata handle returned in MLCameraCaptureCallbacks.
Color correction mode.
Failed to obtain color correction due to an invalid input parameter.
Successfully obtained color correction.
Failed to obtain color correction due to an unknown error.

briefdescription.para: Gets color correction transform from RGB color space to output linear sRGB.

parameterdescription.para: Camera capture result metadata handle returned in MLCameraCaptureCallbacks.
3x3 color correction transform matrix.
Failed to obtain color correction transform due to an invalid input parameter.
Successfully obtained color correction transform.
Failed to obtain color correction transform due to an unknown error.
Camera capture result metadata handle returned in MLCameraCaptureCallbacks.
Color correction aberration mode.
Failed to obtain color correction aberration due to an invalid input parameter.
Successfully obtained color correction aberration.
Failed to obtain color correction aberration due to an unknown error.

briefdescription.para: Gets color correction gains. The gains in the result metadata are the gains applied by the camera device to the current frame.

parameterdescription.para: Camera capture result metadata handle returned in MLCameraCaptureCallbacks.
An array of floats for 4 color channel color correction gains.
Failed to obtain color correction gains due to an invalid input parameter.
Successfully obtained color correction gains.
Failed to obtain color correction gains due to an unknown error.

AE antibanding mode.
Failed to obtain AE antibanding mode due to an invalid input parameter.
Successfully obtained AE antibanding mode.
Failed to obtain AE antibanding mode due to an unknown error.
Camera capture result metadata handle returned in MLCameraCaptureCallbacks.
AE exposure compensation.

Successfully obtained AE exposure compensation.
Failed to obtain AE exposure compensation due to an unknown error.

detaileddescription.para: When auto-exposure is locked, the algorithm cannot update its parameters and adjust exposure times and sensitivity.

Number of auto-focus regions.

briefdescription.para: Gets AF distance range. Both Min and Max are specified as focus distance in diopters. The min value specifies the lower bound for focus distance used by Autofocus algorithm and should be more than min focus distance which can be queried using MLCameraMetadataGetLensInfoMinimumFocusDistance. The max value specifies the upper bound for focus distance used by Autofocus algorithm and should be less than hyperfocal distance which can be queried using API MLCameraMetadataGetLensInfoHyperfocalDistance.

parameterdescription.para: Camera capture result metadata handle returned in MLCameraCaptureCallbacks.
AF distance range [min, max].
Failed to obtain AF distance range due to an invalid input parameter.
Successfully obtained AF distance range.
Failed to obtain AF distance range due to an unknown error.

briefdescription.para: Gets AF scene change detection status.

AF scene change detected or not.

Successfully obtained AF scene change detection status.

Camera capture result metadata handle returned in MLCameraCaptureCallbacks.
Scene mode.

Successfully obtained scene mode.
Failed to obtain scene mode due to an unknown error.

Camera capture result metadata handle returned in MLCameraCaptureCallbacks.
Resolution of embedded JPEG thumbnail. When set to 0, thumbnail will not be included.
Failed to obtain JPEG thumbnail size due to an invalid input parameter.
Successfully obtained JPEG thumbnail size.
Failed to obtain JPEG thumbnail size due to an unknown error.

briefdescription.para: Gets force apply mode. Main camera and CV Camera share the same camera hardware resources. When both the cameras are streaming, request metadata properties for both cameras are merged and then applied. While merging, the metadata properties from Main Camera take precedence over CV camera metadata properties. The force apply mode property can be used to override this. If CV Camera metadata has force apply mode on, the CV Camera metadata properties take precedence over Main Camera metadata properties.

parameterdescription.para: Camera capture result metadata handle returned in MLCameraCaptureCallbacks.
Force apply mode.
Failed to obtain force apply mode due to an invalid input parameter.
Successfully obtained force apply mode.
Failed to obtain force apply mode due to an unknown error.
Camera capture result metadata handle returned in MLCameraCaptureCallbacks.
Compression quality of JPEG thumbnail, with 100 being the highest quality, and 1 the lowest.
Failed to obtain JPEG quality due to an invalid input parameter.
Successfully obtained JPEG quality.
Failed to obtain JPEG quality due to an unknown error.
